name: Mirror Loop Kiosk (Pi Zero 2 W + C920 → TV)
description: Pi OS Lite (64-bit) + a two-phase first-boot install that runs the DarkHaus Mirror Loop installation: a Pygame renderer showing the Logitech C920 feed with per-phase mirror/glitch/break/capture effects FULLSCREEN on an HDMI TV via SDL kmsdrm (no X, no Chromium — a 512MB Zero 2 W can't run Chromium well). Camera-only motion detection drives the DETECTION->MIRROR->DELAY->GLITCH->BREAK->CAPTURE->RESET state machine; telemetry.py posts heartbeats + sessions + phase events to the shared Supabase so the unit appears live on sinsera.co/mirrorloop. Test target: Pi Zero 2 WH on a Sony Bravia 65-inch.

preconfigured.user: peta (no password — SSH-key only, sudo NOPASSWD)
preconfigured.kiosk_user: mirror (auto-login on tty1, runs the Pygame renderer via SDL kmsdrm)
preconfigured.wifi: from ~/.ark/wifi.env via NetworkManager nmconnection (Zero 2 W is WiFi-only)
preconfigured.env: /opt/mirror-loop/.env — anon key + email baked, MIRROR_PASSWORD BLANK (fill over SSH to enable telemetry)
preconfigured.display: C920 feed + effects, FULLSCREEN on HDMI (SDL kmsdrm, pygame SCALED upscales 480x360 render to TV native res)
preconfigured.tuning: _DEFAULT_RESOLUTION 480x360 @18fps, 3.0s buffer, swap bumped to 512MB — tuned down from Pi 5 defaults

first_boot_sequence: Phase 1 (~30s): firstrun.sh sets up peta user + SSH + WiFi + hostname. Reboots.

Phase 2 (~10-20 min on a Zero 2 W over WiFi): apt-installs python3-opencv + python3-pygame + numpy + requests + dotenv + SDL2; bumps swap; HDMI force-hotplug; creates 'mirror' user with tty1 autologin → run-mirror-loop.sh. Reboots.
Phase 3: tty1 autologin launches the Pygame renderer fullscreen on the TV; telemetry posts to sinsera.co/mirrorloop once MIRROR_PASSWORD is set.
notes: UNVERIFIED ON HARDWARE: built without a Zero 2 W to test on. Likely needs on-Pi tuning over SSH (SDL kmsdrm display, C920 v4l2 index, motion threshold, fps).
MIRROR_PASSWORD ships BLANK by design — display runs immediately; telemetry stays off until you fill it.
Disabled for this unit: audio, ZINK printer, GPIO shredder, PIR sensor, config_manager (camera-only via the built-in fallback detector).
